top_signals.title: Good Medicine Is Combat Power: Clinical Innovation and the Lessons of the Russo-Ukrainian War
top_signals.summary:
War is a brutal driver of medical innovation. Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine has forced clinicians and commanders alike to confront a hard truth: Survival depends not only on tactics and technology, but on the ability to deliver advanced care under fire, evacuate and resuscitate the wounded, and preserve fighting strength despite repeated attacks on healthcare systems.Ukraine’s experience has reshaped combat medicine through necessity, resilience, and improvisation. The central question is no longer whether NATO can observe these lessons, but whether it can build a system bold enough to capture, test, scale, and field them at wartime speed. The NATO

The post Good Medicine Is Combat Power: Clinical Innovation and the Lessons of the Russo-Ukrainian War appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran conclude high-level talks in Switzerland, mediators say
top_signals.summary: Iran's foreign minister said Tehran had secured waivers for oil and petrochemical exports, the release of some frozen assets and the launch of a reconstruction plan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S., Iran agree on roadmap for final deal and plan to end military operations in Lebanon
top_signals.summary: The talks were the first round of negotiations under a memorandum of understanding signed last week, which extended a tenuous ceasefire by 60 days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed record $6.4B in 30 days amid crypto winter chill
top_signals.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds saw their biggest 30-day net outflow since launching in 2024, coming as Bitcoin fell 17% over the past month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

The American Civil War gave us The Red Badge of Courage. World War I gave us All Quiet on the Western Front. top_signals.title: Macron’s Nuclear Gamble: Building a European Deterrent Faster Than French Politics Can Tear Down
top_signals.summary:
In early March, French President Emmanuel Macron stood at a windswept submarine base on the Breton coast and quietly buried four decades of French nuclear orthodoxy. The arsenal would grow. The numbers would be hidden. And for the first time, nuclear weapons that France built to defend Paris might one day be deployed to protect Berlin.Three simultaneous shifts — an increase of nuclear warheads; an end to transparency over the size of the force de frappe; and the launch of “advanced deterrence,” a framework offering European partners strategic dialogues, invitations to French nuclear exercises, and the potential forward basing of

The post Macron’s Nuclear Gamble: Building a European Deterrent Faster Than French Politics Can Tear Down appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Trump Ally Wins Colombian Election Heralding Pro-Business Swing
top_signals.summary: Colombia elected conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella president on Sunday, heralding a swing back to business-friendly and pro-US policies after four years of leftist rule.

top_signals.title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
top_signals.summary: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.
